scope:
Build a Python CLI tool called 'pyvulncheck' that scans a project's dependencies for known vulnerabilities. The tool should:
1) Parse dependencies from requirements.txt and pyproject.toml (support both formats).
2) Query the PyPI JSON API to resolve package metadata including versions, homepage, summary.
3) Query the OSV.dev API (https://api.osv.dev/v1/query) to check each package+version against known vulnerabilities.
4) Generate a terminal report using 'rich' with severity-colored output (critical=red, high=yellow, moderate=cyan), showing package name, installed version, vulnerability ID, severity, and summary.
5) Support --format flag for 'table' (default, rich table) and 'json' (machine-readable output).
6) Exit with code 1 if any critical/high vulnerabilities are found, 0 otherwise.
Include proper error handling for network failures and malformed input files. Write pytest tests covering the parsing logic and report generation with mocked API responses.

tasks.title: Parse dependencies from requirements.txt and pyproject.toml
tasks.description: Implement a DependencyParser class that reads and parses dependency files (requirements.txt, pyproject.toml) to extract package names and versions. The class should have methods: parse_requirements() -> dict[str, str], parse_pyproject_toml() -> dict[str, str]. Ensure proper error handling for malformed input files. Tests: test parsing of valid requirements.txt and pyproject.toml with expected outputs.

tasks.title: Query PyPI JSON API to resolve package metadata
tasks.description: Implement a PackageMetadata class that queries the PyPI JSON API for package details using pypi_json library. The class should have methods: get_package_metadata(package_name: str) -> dict, which returns package information including version, homepage, summary. Ensure proper error handling for network failures and invalid inputs. Tests: test successful retrieval of metadata for a valid package name.

task_summaries: ✗ task_1: Parse dependencies from requirements.txt and pyproject.toml (3 iter)
✗ task_2: Query PyPI JSON API to resolve package metadata (2 iter)
